zh.lifeSummary: 當Ivetta Grey於1340年出生在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas Grey I55歲，母親Agnes de Beyle51歲。她於大約1360年與William d' Clopton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ivetta Grey于1340年出生在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Grey I55岁，母亲Agnes de Beyle51岁。她于大约1360年与William d' Clopton在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴肯哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1370年在英国英格兰素福爾可維其哈布盧可享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Ivetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ivatt
meanings: English: relationship name from a pet form of the Old French personal name Iva, feminine form of Ivo. Compare Ive .

en.lifeSummary: When Ivetta Grey was born in 1340, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Thomas Grey I, was 55 and her mother, Agnes de Beyle, was 51. She married William d' Clopton about 1360, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1370, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ivetta Grey est née en 1340, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Grey I, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Beyle, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé William d' Clopton environ 1360, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1370, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ivetta Grey 1340 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Grey I 55 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Beyle 51. Sie hat um 1360 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom William d' Clopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ivetta Grey è nata il nel 1340 nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Grey I, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Beyle, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato William d' Clopton circa 1360, nel Buckenham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1370, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ivetta Greyが1340年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Grey Iは55歳，母Agnes de Beyleは51歳であった。約1360年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムでWilliam d' Cloptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1370年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ivetta Grey(이)가 1340년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Grey I(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Beyle(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 벅함에서 William d' Clopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ivetta Grey nasceu em 1340, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Grey I, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Beyle, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com William d' Clopton aproximadamente 1360, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1370, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ivetta Grey родилась в 1340 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Grey I было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Beyle, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William d' Clopton около 1360 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ivetta Grey nació en 1340, en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Grey I, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Agnes de Beyle, tenía 51 años. Se casó con William d' Clopton aproximadamente 1360, en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1370, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
